compiled_state.title: Sprint implementation reference injection: component-level technical guidance from reference library
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Follow-on epic stub — needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (scrutiny:pending).

## Context
When sprint dispatches implementation sub-agents for UI tasks, agents currently have no access to component-level technical guidance from the reference library established by epic 0b7c-d811. This epic integrates ref-query.sh into the sprint implementation pipeline, querying at Implementation tier for entries matching the specific component being built — accessibility attributes, WCAG 2.2 technical patterns, USWDS implementation guidance. Narrowest and most targeted injection among the six epics.

## Success Criteria
- Sprint implementation sub-agents query .claude/scripts/dso ref-query at Implementation tier for UI tasks
- Injection scoped to the specific component type being built; typically 3-8 entries
- Accessibility attributes, WCAG 2.2 implementation patterns, and USWDS technical guidance injected before code generation
- Non-UI implementation tasks are not affected

## Dependencies
- Epic 0b7c-d811 (ref-query.sh retrieval contract) must be complete before this epic can be implemented
